'''baduhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zambuq|zambuq]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-d-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zambuq|zambuq]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| baduhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bædihith|bædihith]] || [[word:bædihij|bædihij]] || [[word:bædihish|bædihish]] || [[word:bædihi|bædihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:baduduhuth|baduduhuth]] || [[word:baduduhuj|baduduhuj]] || [[word:baduduhush|baduduhush]] || [[word:baduduhu|baduduhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:baduhuth|baduhuth]] || [[word:baduhuj|baduhuj]] || [[word:baduhush|baduhush]] || [[word:baduhu|baduhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:badufhuth|badufhuth]] || [[word:badufhuj|badufhuj]] || [[word:badufhush|badufhush]] || [[word:badufhuf|badufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:baduhuthu|baduhuthu]] || [[word:baduhuju|baduhuju]] || [[word:baduhushu|baduhushu]] || [[word:baduhuku|baduhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:baduhuth|baduhuth]] || [[word:baduhuj|baduhuj]] || [[word:baduhush|baduhush]] || [[word:baduhu|baduhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:baduhuthul|baduhuthul]] || [[word:baduhujul|baduhujul]] || [[word:baduhushul|baduhushul]] || [[word:baduhukul|baduhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:baduhuthuthu|baduhuthuthu]] || [[word:baduhujuju|baduhujuju]] || [[word:baduhushushu|baduhushushu]] || [[word:baduhuku|baduhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:baduhuthun|baduhuthun]] || [[word:baduhujun|baduhujun]] || [[word:baduhushun|baduhushun]] || [[word:baduhukun|baduhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:baduhuthuoro|baduhuthuoro]] || [[word:baduhujuoro|baduhujuoro]] || [[word:baduhushuoro|baduhushuoro]] || [[word:baduhukuoro|baduhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
